metadata.description: Visual canvas for design work — Drafted plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: drafted
plugins.description: Multi-tenant design canvas for Claude. Create, edit, and organize HTML/markdown frames on a real-time surface at drafted.live. Bundles the remote MCP connector + 4 slash commands (/drafted:status, /drafted:share, /drafted:new-project, /drafted:focus) + a Drafted skill that teaches Claude how to use the canvas effectively.
